verification_gaps: Full no-spend kind control-plane smoke was not run because this review workspace has no configured Kubernetes context or kind-scion-ops cluster access.

repair_verification.requested_repair: Verify scripts/kind-control-plane-smoke.py now checks fixtureBacked/runtime.liveService rather than mocked/runtime.previewService.
evidence: scripts/kind-control-plane-smoke.py:481-499 validates liveReadsAllowed=true, mutationsAllowed=false, snapshotPath=/api/snapshot, and streamPath=/api/events.
git grep found no mocked, previewService, new-ui-eval, or new_ui_eval references in scripts/kind-control-plane-smoke.py.

verification.command: uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_adapter.py

verification.details: Rendered manifest contains scion-ops-web-app Service and Deployment and no separate scion-ops-new-ui-eval resource.
No Kubernetes contexts are configured in the review workspace; live kind smoke could not be executed.

summary: Verdict: accept. The previous blocking smoke-contract defect is repaired: kind-control-plane smoke now validates the promoted live web-app snapshot through fixtureBacked=false and runtime.liveService, including read-only safeguards and snapshot/event paths, and no longer references mocked/runtime.previewService or the retired new-ui-eval endpoint. OpenSpec validation, frontend typecheck/test/build, adapter tests, and rendered kustomize inspection pass. PR is ready subject to the remaining environment-only gap of running the full no-spend kind smoke on an available kind control-plane cluster.
